content.text: The system shall allow users to navigate to the Raw Data screen via the path MHE → MEPS → Raw Data.
navigate to the Raw Data screen
I can download raw analytics data
the user is on the MHE module
the user selects MHE → MEPS → Raw Data
the system shall open the Raw Data screen.
The system shall display the screen title “Raw Data” at the top of the page.
I know which page I am on
the Raw Data screen is displayed
the system shall display “Raw Data” at the top.
The system shall display a section titled “Download Raw Data (CSV)”.
I can access CSV download functionality
the Raw Data screen is displayed
the system shall display “Download Raw Data (CSV)” section.
The system shall display a “Select MHE” dropdown field as a mandatory field.
the system shall display available MHE assets.
The system shall display a list of available MHE assets (e.g., MHE-001, Forklift-xxxx, Order-Picker, etc.) in the dropdown.
the system shall display MHE assets (e.g., MHE-001, Forklift, Order Picker).
The system shall allow users to select one MHE from the dropdown list.
the system shall allow selection of only one MHE.
The system shall display the selected MHE value in the input field after selection.
the system shall display the selected MHE in the input field.
The system shall display a “Select Sensor” dropdown field as a mandatory field.
the system shall mark it as mandatory.

9.title: Enable Sensor Dropdown After MHE Selection

content.text: The system shall disable the Sensor dropdown until an MHE is selected.
sensor dropdown enabled after MHE selection
the user views the Sensor dropdown
the system shall keep it disabled
the user views the Sensor dropdown
The system shall display available sensor types (e.g., Speed Sensor, Access Control Sensor, Location Sensor).
the system shall display sensor types (Speed, Access Control, Location).
The system shall allow users to select one sensor type from the dropdown.
the system shall allow selection of one sensor.
The system shall display the selected sensor in the input field.
the system shall display selected sensor in the input field.
The system shall display a “Select Date Range” field as a mandatory field.
the Date Range field is displayed
the system shall mark it as mandatory.

14.title: Enable Date Range After Sensor Selection

content.text: The system shall disable the Date Range field until a sensor is selected.
date range enabled after sensor selection
the user views the Date Range field
the system shall keep it disabled
The system shall allow users to select a start date and end date using a calendar picker.
the Date Range field is enabled
the system shall allow selecting start and end date.
The system shall display the selected date range in the format (e.g., Apr 01, 2026 – Apr 17, 2026).
the system shall display the range in correct format.
The system shall restrict the maximum selectable date range to 31 days.
The system shall display the selected duration (e.g., “Selected range: 16 days (Maximum 31 days allowed)”).
the system shall display duration (e.g., 16 days, max 31 days).
The system shall display a “Download CSV” button.
the system shall display Download CSV button.
The system shall keep the Download CSV button disabled until all mandatory fields (MHE, Sensor, Date Range) are selected.
the system shall keep it disabled.
The system shall enable the Download CSV button once all required inputs are provided.
the system shall enable Download CSV.
The system shall allow users to download raw data in CSV format based on selected filters.
the system shall generate and download the file.
The system shall generate and download the file with relevant data corresponding to selected MHE, sensor, and date range.
the system shall include relevant data.
The system shall display validation indicators (*) for mandatory fields.
the system shall display (*) for mandatory fields.
The system shall prevent CSV download if any required field is not selected.
The system shall highlight the active menu item “Raw Data” in the left navigation panel.
the Raw Data screen is open
